ValidationRule.description: Result Reason Explanation Mandatory when Closing Opp ortunity
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( IsClosed, Result_Reason_Explanation__c ="", $RecordType.Name != '5. Pre-Pipeline IS Opportunity', $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must give an Explanation when closing an opportunity.
